title: predict the future
subtitle: What would it take to empirically test astrological claims?

questions.question: Will the United States pass comprehensive federal AI regulation before 2027?
Will a formal ceasefire agreement be reached in the Russia-Ukraine conflict before 2027?
Will a major tech company release a commercially available AGI-like system before 2030?
Will the U.S. Federal Reserve cut interest rates at least three times in 2026?
Will 2026 rank among the top three hottest years ever recorded globally?
Which company will have the highest market capitalization at the end of 2026?
Will voter turnout in the 2026 U.S. midterm elections exceed 50% of eligible voters?
Will a private company successfully land humans on the Moon before 2030?
Will AI-generated content account for more than 50% of internet content by 2028?
Will global GDP growth exceed 3.5% in 2026?
Will a new WHO-declared global health emergency occur before the end of 2026?
Will renewable energy account for more than 40% of global electricity generation by 2028?
Will Apple release a mass-market AR or VR headset with over 10 million units sold in its first year?
Will China initiate a military blockade or invasion of Taiwan before 2030?
Will Bitcoin reach a new all-time high before the end of 2026?
Will Iran reopen the Strait of Hormuz before May 1, 2026?
Will the U.S. attack Iranian power or desalination plants before April 15, 2026?
Will the missing U.S. service member shot down over Iran be recovered alive?
Will a formal ceasefire between the U.S.-Israel coalition and Iran be announced before July 2026?
Will Iran carry out strikes on Gulf bridges listed in its retaliation threat by May 2026?
Will the U.S. formally withdraw from NATO before the end of 2026?
Will the Supreme Court uphold birthright citizenship in Trump v. Barbara?
Will Congress pass Trump's $1.5 trillion defense budget request in 2026?
Will the DHS partial shutdown be fully resolved before June 2026?
Will Trump's newly appointed Attorney General face a Senate confirmation challenge?
Will the Artemis II crew successfully complete their lunar flyby and return safely to Earth?
Will NASA launch Artemis III (crewed lunar landing) before the end of 2027?
Will the Meta/YouTube social media harm verdict survive appeal at the federal level?
Will Congress pass federal legislation regulating social media platform design for minors by 2027?
Will oil prices exceed $120/barrel within 30 days due to Strait of Hormuz disruption?
Will the U.S. stock market (S&P 500) fall more than 10% from its April 2026 level by June 2026?
Will Pete Hegseth resign or be removed as Secretary of Defense before January 2027?
Will the U.S. deploy ground troops to Iran before the end of 2026?
Will the UK-led 40-nation coalition agree on concrete economic measures against Iran by May 2026?
Will the U.S. lift sanctions on Venezuela's acting President Delcy Rodríguez lead to a formal diplomatic normalization by end of 2026?
Will Democrats win control of the U.S. House of Representatives in the 2026 Midterm elections?
Will any U.S. state successfully implement its own independent regulations for prediction markets by 2027?
